inputs.label: Current Property Value
inputs.businessContext: The appraised market value of the property.

businessContext_i18n.en: The appraised market value of the property.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur marchande estimée de la propriété.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor de mercado tasado de la propiedad.

inputs.label: Existing Mortgage Balance
inputs.businessContext: The outstanding balance on the current mortgage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The outstanding balance on the current mortgage.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der ausstehende Saldo der aktuellen Hypothek.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le solde restant sur l'hypothèque actuelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: El saldo pendiente de la hipoteca actual.

inputs.label: Desired Cash-Out Amount
inputs.businessContext: The amount of equity to withdraw in cash.

label_i18n.es: Monto deseado de retiro de efectivo

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount of equity to withdraw in cash.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakit olarak çekilecek öz sermaye miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Betrag des Eigenkapitals, der in bar abgehoben werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant de la valeur nette à retirer en espèces.
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad de capital a retirar en efectivo.

inputs.label: Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate for the new refinance loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual interest rate for the new refinance loan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeni refinansman kredisi için yıllık faiz oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Zinssatz für das neue Refinanzierungsdarlehen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt annuel du nouveau prêt de refinancement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés anual del nuevo préstamo de refinanciación.

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: The duration of the new loan in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: The duration of the new loan in years.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Laufzeit des neuen Darlehens in Jahren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée du nouveau prêt en années.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del nuevo préstamo en años.

inputs.label: Closing Costs
inputs.businessContext: Total closing costs and fees for the refinance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total closing costs and fees for the refinance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Refinansman için toplam kapanış maliyetleri ve ücretleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Abschlusskosten und Gebühren für die Refinanzierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de clôture et frais totaux pour le refinancement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos de cierre y comisiones totales de la refinanciación.

formulas.monthlyPayment: newLoanAmount * monthlyInterestRate * ((1 + monthlyInterestRate) ** numberOfPayments) / (((1 + monthlyInterestRate) ** numberOfPayments) - 1)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
